title: Is "Radar" style chart on the roadmap?
excerpt: Hello, I’m wondering if there is any plan to add the “Radar” style of chart that is supported in MS Excel.  Here’s an example of how I use it to show project risk distribution:

posts.author: scottmorley (Scott Morley)
